title: tilia rubra var. multiflora
intro: Tilia rubra var. multiflora, also known as the red-barked linden or multiflorous small-leaved lime, is a variety of the small-leaved lime tree, characterized by its distinctive red bark and multiple small white flowers. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Tilia rubra var. multiflora include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate respiratory issues such as colds and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
